REM CONFIG CRC IS C3D9
HW_RESET_I2C,00,
SLEEP,00,2000,
NCI_CORE_RESET,00,
NCI_CORE_INIT,0000,
SLEEP,00,200
REM RESET THE CUSTOMER FIELD
NCI_SEND_PROP,0F,02,040006010008000000000000a5a5
SLEEP,00,200
REM HARDWARE CONFIGURATION
NCI_SEND_PROP,0F,02,04000201002400120E138801F406000404FF080203052600000500000000000000000404530000000009
SLEEP,00,200
REM Writing CustomA RF Parameters
NCI_SEND_PROP,0F,02,
REM Writing CustomB RF Parameters
NCI_SEND_PROP,0F,02,040010010154C0593D6600040242040402420303142D3D3D3D3D3D3D3D2C2C2C000000000000000000FC000000000000000000000000404040E04040404040404081949444959595450000000000000000000000000000000000
REM Set DPC table
NCI_DIRECT_CTRL,2F,02,04000301004A6F0CBB0CFF0C540D9F0DEB0D360E7F0ECD0E170F5F0F9F0FC70FEE0FFF0FFF0FFF08FF08FF08FF08FF08FF085B09B209050A530A9F0AEF0A3B0B8A0BD30B0D0C0D0C0D0C0D0CFFFFFF1F
SLEEP,00,200
REM UICC CONFIG
NCI_DIRECT_CTRL,2F,02,04000A01001A40003C3C04B027100AF007D003E807D00064271003E832C81964
SLEEP,00,200
REM SE CONFIG
NCI_DIRECT_CTRL,2F,02,04000B01001A40041E1E04B027100AF007D003E807D00064271003E832C81964
SLEEP,00,200
REM IOT CONFIG
NCI_DIRECT_CTRL,2F,02,04000801000CDF01FF000000C1C2C3003D00
SLEEP,00,200
REM ANTENNA CONFIG
NCI_DIRECT_CTRL,2F,02,0400090100200000E10BB801B5FFEC0000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000
SLEEP,00,200
REM NFCC CONFIG
NCI_DIRECT_CTRL,2F,02,0400010100053057000606
SLEEP,00,200
REM LOGGING CONFIG
NCI_SEND_PROP,0F,02,
SLEEP,00,200
REM WRITE CONFIGURATION CRC IN THE CUSTOMER FIELD
NCI_SEND_PROP,0F,02,040006010008000000000000C3D9
SLEEP,00,200
HW_RESET_I2C,00,
SLEEP,00,2000,
NCI_CORE_RESET,00,
NCI_CORE_INIT,0000,
REM MATCHING ;63.1;2.95;64.7;Differential;Yes;15;560;No;No;ANT;1500;4.7;78;100;1500;77;DNP;150
REM CONFIGURATION ;1421.96355932203;725.826370770679;8.76493706013245;No;No;Differential;Yes;77;560;147;177;DNP;DNP;ANT;47;33;4.7;100;4.5
REM TOOL VERSION 3.2
